---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Why is the current behavior
insufficient? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What would you like MingCang to do? Be specific about user-facing
behavior and affected modules if you know them. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Backend (`backend/`)
- [ ] Frontend (`frontend/`)
- [ ] Agent / MCP (`backend/agent/`)
- [ ] Paper trading (`paper_trading/`)
- [ ] Docs

## Out of Scope (Reminder)

MingCang does not place real orders and does not provide financial advice.
Feature requests that imply automatic trading or price prediction will be
declined.
